languages.text: Ярубу нужны подходящие условия. Вольный Торговец может либо отвлечь стражу, либо воспользоваться смятением, вызванным бомбардировкой.

traits.locale_text: Ярубу нужны подходящие условия. Вольный Торговец может либо отвлечь стражу, либо воспользоваться смятением, вызванным бомбардировкой.

languages.text: Jarub requires suitable conditions. The Rogue Trader can either distract the guards or take advantage of the confusion wrought by the bombardment.

languages.text: Jarub braucht geeignete Bedingungen. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} kann entweder die Wachen ablenken oder sich die Verwirrung während des Bombardements zunutze machen.
languages.original_text: Jarub requires suitable conditions. The Rogue Trader can either distract the guards or take advantage of the confusion wrought by the bombardment.

traits.locale_text: Jarub braucht geeignete Bedingungen. {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} kann entweder die Wachen ablenken oder sich die Verwirrung während des Bombardements zunutze machen.

languages.text: Jarub a besoin de conditions favorables. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} peut détourner l'attention des gardes ou profiter de la confusion pendant le bombardement.
languages.original_text: Jarub requires suitable conditions. The Rogue Trader can either distract the guards or take advantage of the confusion wrought by the bombardment.

traits.locale_text: Jarub a besoin de conditions favorables. {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} peut détourner l'attention des gardes ou profiter de la confusion pendant le bombardement.

languages.text: 雅鲁布需要合适的时机。行商浪人可以引开守卫，或者利用轰炸引发混乱。
languages.original_text: Jarub requires suitable conditions. The Rogue Trader can either distract the guards or take advantage of the confusion wrought by the bombardment.

traits.locale_text: 雅鲁布需要合适的时机。行商浪人可以引开守卫，或者利用轰炸引发混乱。

languages.text: Jarub requiere que las condiciones sean óptimas. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente puede distraer a los guardias o bien aprovechar la confusión causada por el bombardeo.
languages.original_text: Jarub requires suitable conditions. The Rogue Trader can either distract the guards or take advantage of the confusion wrought by the bombardment.

traits.locale_text: Jarub requiere que las condiciones sean óptimas. {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente puede distraer a los guardias o bien aprovechar la confusión causada por el bombardeo.

languages.text: ヤルブには適切な条件が必要だ。フリー・トレーダーは警備兵の注意をそらすか、砲撃による混乱に乗じることができる。
languages.original_text: Yarub needs the right conditions. The Free Trader can either distract the guards or take advantage of the confusion caused by the bombardment.

languages.text: Jarub, uygun koşulların oluşmasına ihtiyaç duyuyor. Hür Tacir, muhafızların dikkatini dağıtabilir ya da bombardımanın yarattığı kargaşadan yararlanabilir.
